citations.narrative:
On the island housing three spider monkeys, there is a lighthouse structure that has areas of chipped and peeling paint.
The lower section of the lighthouse has paint flakes with lifted edges that the spider monkeys can access.
Chipping and peeling paint can be injurious to the animals if ingested. Housing facilities must be kept in good repair and
protect the animals from injury.
To be corrected by April 3, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
3.75(a) 
   
Housing facilities, general. 
On the island housing three spider monkeys, there is a lighthouse structure that has areas of chipped and peeling paint. 
The lower section of the lighthouse has paint flakes with lifted edges that the spider monkeys can access.  
Chipping and peeling paint can be injurious to the animals if ingested. Housing facilities must be kept in good repair and 
protect the animals from injury. 
To be corrected by April 3, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives. 
 
 n
